Name: CUTSCENE_TIMEZONE_CONVERT_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the timezone conversion parameters for a cutscene.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Network Test Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the NT version or mark the ones to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Release Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the product version or mark the items to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Current Time for Conversion
Fields.Description: Start time of the time zone to be converted to cutscene time. In hours.

Fields.Name: Cutscene Time after Conversion
Fields.Description: Enter the time used during cutscene playback. In hours.
